data.description_suggestion: Creates a new stock consignment record in the system. Accepts consignment details including supplier information, items, and terms. data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing. Added details about expected inputs (supplier info, items, terms), return value (new consignment with ID), and side effects (inventory tracking establishment) to enable AI agents to understand the operation's full impact.

message: Operation 'deleteConsignment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing. data.description_suggestion: Deletes a consignment record from the system. Removes the consignment relationship and associated tracking. data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing. Added important side effects (inventory impact, supplier reconciliation), warning about irreversibility, and context about when this operation should be used to help AI agents make appropriate decisions about deletion.

Operation 'getChannelRequest' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. The current summary is somewhat vague and the description is completely empty. An AI agent needs to understand: (1) what a 'channel request log' represents in the retail context, (2) what information is returned, (3) when this operation should be used (e.g., auditing), and (4) what parameters are required. The improved description provides domain context about sales channels, clarifies the purpose (auditing/review), and explains the required input parameter for better AI agent interpretability.
